Stream by Sandbar

# Stream by Sandbar

## The private voice ring for everything on your mind

156 followers

## The private voice ring for everything on your mind

156 followers

Visit website

Knowledge base software

•

Wearables

•

AI Dictation Apps

Stream is a private voice ring for everything on your mind. Notes, Chat, Dictation—in one. To use Stream: just press, speak, and release. Stream can capture notes, dictate across apps, and respond to questions via earbuds or connected speakers. As a self extension, Stream supports your thinking through thoughtful questions and intelligent responses, rather than having an independent identity of its own.

results.title: Willow Voice: Voice dictation that actually works | Product Hunt
results.content:
#### vs Alternatives

Wispr FlowWispr Flow

Because of the privacy and safety features, this product is designed with safety and privacy in mind and does not grab my data for its own benefit and training purposes. There are actually a number of certifications that they hold when it comes to privacy that none of their competitors hold.

#### What's great

keyboard integration (2)seamless experience (4)actual, accurate dictation (5)

I have only been using Willow Voice (both Mac and iOS) for two days, and it is already edging out a competitor's product I've used for 6 months. After joining their Slack community, I am very impressed to see how quickly they respond to user feedback. [...] 4.9

Based on 10 reviews

Review Willow Voice?

Reviewers say Willow Voice is unusually accurate, fast, and easy to fold into daily work, especially for writing in Slack, Gmail, Notion, coding tools, and any Mac app. Many praise its ability to clean up rambling speech, preserve context, and reduce or replace large amounts of typing with little editing. Users also highlight responsive support and strong privacy posture. The main complaints are occasional slow responses, an annoying inactivity notification that cannot be disabled, limits on heavy free-tier use, and imperfect handling of non-English dictation.

+7

keyboard integration(2) [...] #### vs Alternatives

I have used MacWhisper, TalkTastic, and Wispr Flow; the free version of each. I like that Willow Voice includes the Willow Assistant feature in the free version for initial evaluation. As mentioned earlier, I am only two days into my evaluation, but I'm extremely pleased so far. This really looks like a keeper!

results.title: Willow Voice: Voice dictation that actually works | Product Hunt
results.content:
#### vs Alternatives

Wispr Flow

Because of the privacy and safety features, this product is designed with safety and privacy in mind and does not grab my data for its own benefit and training purposes. There are actually a number of certifications that they hold when it comes to privacy that none of their competitors hold.

Bruce Zimmer

#### What's great

I have only been using Willow Voice (both Mac and iOS) for two days, and it is already edging out a competitor's product I've used for 6 months. After joining their Slack community, I am very impressed to see how quickly they respond to user feedback.

#### vs Alternatives [...] #### vs Alternatives

I have used MacWhisper, TalkTastic, and Wispr Flow; the free version of each. I like that Willow Voice includes the Willow Assistant feature in the free version for initial evaluation. As mentioned earlier, I am only two days into my evaluation, but I'm extremely pleased so far. This really looks like a keeper! [...] #### vs Alternatives

I tried Whisper, but it wasn't nearly as fast or as accurate as Willow Voice. Willow's speed, transcription quality, and seamless workflow made it the clear choice for me.We're also Mac-based, and Apple's built in dictation is pretty poor by comparison.

Martijn van Noordennen

#### What's great

I use Willow throughout my day. It saves me a whole bunch of time because it very accurately captures my dictation, and it helps me to talk rather than type, which speeds up all my activities throughout the day tremendously.

#### What needs improvement
